      Acetaminophen & 10.554 & 1.427 & 0.5026 & 0.0785 \\

      \item Unit prices standardised to per-100-tablet equivalent.
    \end{tablenotes}
  \end{threeparttable}
\end{table}

\begin{table}[htbp]
  \centering

    \begin{tabular}{lcr}

      Neural Demand (CF) & $-0.2314 \pm 0.0069$ & +1.4\% \\
      Neural Demand (habit, CF) & $-0.2129 \pm 0.0028$ & +9.2\% \\

    \begin{tablenotes}\small

  \end{threeparttable}
\end{table}

\begin{table}[htbp]
  \centering
  \caption{MDP State Augmentation: Brand Loyalty in Analgesic Demand (2 run(s); mean $\pm$ std)}
  \label{tab:dom_mdp}
  \begin{threeparttable}
    \begin{tabular}{lcccc}
      \toprule
      \textbf{Model} & \textbf{RMSE} & \textbf{KL Div.} & \textbf{Reduction} \\
      \midrule
      LA-AIDS & $0.07069 \pm 0.00000$ & $0.02311 \pm 0.00000$ & baseline \\
      Neural Demand (static) & $0.08428 \pm 0.00565$ & $0.03239 \pm 0.00418$ & -19.2% \\
      Neural Demand (habit) & $0.05079 \pm 0.00096$ & $0.01198 \pm 0.00057$ & 28.1% \\
      Neural Demand (placebo) & $0.08048 \pm 0.00194$ & $0.02978 \pm 0.00149$ & -13.9% \\
      Neural Demand (CF) & $0.07299 \pm 0.00385$ & $0.02463 \pm 0.00286$ & -3.3% \\
      Neural Demand (habit, CF) & $0.05111 \pm 0.00012$ & $0.01209 \pm 0.00012$ & 27.7% \\
      \bottomrule
    \end{tabular}
    \begin{tablenotes}\small
      \item Habit-decay $\hat{\delta}$ (habit model) = 0.511$\pm$0.002; FE variant: 0.510$\pm$0.003.
      RMSE and KL: mean $\pm$ std over 2 independent re-estimation(s).
      \item \textbf{Diebold-Mariano Test}: Static vs Habit (blocked by store). DM stat = 10.85^{***} ($p=1.110e-16$). Positive stat favors Habit model.
    \end{tablenotes}
  \end{threeparttable}
\end{table}

      \bottomrule

      \item Row $i$, Column $j$: $\epsilon_{ij} = \partial \log q_i / \partial \log p_j$.

    \end{tablenotes}
  \end{threeparttable}
\end{table}
